nodes.context: Irish American criminal street gang active in Lower Manhattan in the 1830s to 1850s.
Irish crime organization in early 19th-century Manhattan, from which Dead Rabbits splintered.
Native-born New Yorkers gang, rivals of Dead Rabbits, supported Know Nothing party.
Ally of Dead Rabbits per infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: The original Dead Rabbits were founded by disgruntled gang members of the Roach Guards
edges.context: Dead Rabbits splintered from Roach Guards.

edges.evidence_quote: Their chief rival gang was the Bowery Boys
edges.context: Dead Rabbits and Bowery Boys were chief rivals, fought over 200 battles.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Chichesters, Tammany Hall, Plug Uglies, Roach Guards, Mulberry Street Boys, Municipal Police, Forty Thieves, Shirt Tails, Kerryonians
edges.context: Chichesters listed as ally of Dead Rabbits in infobox.
